title: Subzerith’s Mace
description: A simple Minecraft texture pack that replaces the mace with a custom scythe.
body:
This lightweight resource pack replaces the default mace with a custom scythe texture, giving your Mace a fresh look. 
![Me holding Mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b362eb9b47e0846d6302d0ba930471e490ac18b8_0.webp)

Features: This lightweight resource pack makes your mace an gray blue scythe!

Be free to use this mace in an texture pack. I would be happy to see it in a texture pack one day!



![Mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7493f3216aaed7b702efa5f2838d999642c9e95e.png)




Be free to join my discord for future updates and mods!
